description_long: This is a modern, two-seater chaise with a sleek, minimalist design. The seat and backrest are smoothly contoured, forming a continuous, gently curved surface upholstered in a dark green fabric. The backrest is moderately high and wraps around the sides, seamlessly transitioning into integrated armrests that flare outward. The chaise is supported by four angled, tapered wooden legs with a natural finish, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The upholstery appears solid and unadorned, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative stitching. The overall form is compact and inviting, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or stylish outdoor seating areas.
description: A sleek, dark green two-seater chaise with curved backrest and armrests, supported by angled wooden legs. The design is minimalist and modern, with smooth, solid upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, highlighting the curved backrest, integrated armrests, and the broad, smooth seat.
description_view_1: Right-side angled view emphasizes the outward flare of the armrest and the tapering wooden legs, showing the seat's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous curve of the backrest and the clean, unadorned back panel, along with the angled legs.
description_view_3: Left-side angled view mirrors the right, showing the armrest's shape and the chaise's overall profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, smoothly curved, and wraps around the sides to form a continuous surface with the armrests. It is unsegmented and lacks any decorative elements or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, seamlessly integrated into the backrest and flaring outward in a gentle curve.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are angled outward, tapered, and made of wood with a natural finish, giving a mid-century modern appearance. They are simple and unadorned.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark green with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous seat cushion integrated into the frame, with no separate or loose cushions visible. The backrest and armrests are also smoothly upholstered as part of the main structure.
